TravelMap.resetSettingsMessage: This resets map display, size, zoom, position, and marker settings. Explored areas, waypoints, and the teleport invitation option will not change.
TravelMap.resetUnavailableReadOnly: This settings file comes from a newer version and is read-only, so it cannot be reset.
TravelMap.futureSettingsReadOnly: A newer map-settings version was detected. This session is read-only and the original file will not be overwritten.
TravelMap.lastDeathUnavailable: There is no death location to return to
TravelMap.areaUnexplored: This area has not been explored
TravelMap.travelActionUnavailable: This travel action is unavailable on the current server or game mode
TravelMap.mapActionBusy: Another map action is still running
TravelMap.settingsSaveFailedSession: Map settings could not be saved; current values remain for this session
TravelMap.settingsSaveFailed: Map settings could not be saved; changes remain for this session.
TravelMap.miniMapZoomSaveFailedSession: Minimap zoom could not be saved; the current value remains for this session
TravelMap.largeMapZoomSaveFailedSession: Large-map zoom could not be saved; the current value remains for this session
TravelMap.largeMapZoomSaveFailed: Large-map zoom could not be saved; the change remains for this session.
TravelMap.settingsUnavailableFormat: Map settings are not writable; in-memory defaults will be used: {0}
TravelMap.persistenceIdentityMissing: A reliable world or player identity is missing; travel-map persistence is disabled
TravelMap.persistenceUnavailableFormat: Map and waypoint persistence is unavailable: {0}
TravelMap.mapStoragePaused: Map storage keeps failing. Recording new chunks is paused; existing exploration is preserved and saving will be retried.
TravelMap.miniMapPositionSaveFailed: Minimap position could not be saved; the current position remains for this session
TravelMap.waypointFileCorrupt: The waypoint file was corrupt; it was isolated and an empty list is being used
TravelMap.invitationPromptFormat: {0} wants to teleport to your position. Accept?
TravelMap.invitationAutoRejected: The player teleport invitation was rejected by your settings
TravelMap.invitationAlreadyPending: One of these players already has a pending teleport invitation
TravelMap.invitationCancelledOffline: The other player went offline; the teleport invitation was cancelled
TravelMap.invitationDeclined: The other player declined the teleport invitation
TravelMap.cannotInviteSelf: You cannot invite yourself to teleport
TravelMap.targetPlayerInvalid: The target player identifier is invalid
TravelMap.crossServerTeleportUnsupported: This server does not support cross-server player teleportation
TravelMap.serverTeleportComponentUnavailable: The server map-teleport component is unavailable
TravelMap.onlineTravelFailed: Online travel request was not completed
TravelMap.onlineTravelBusy: Another online travel request is still running
TravelMap.teleportRejected: The server rejected the map teleport request
TravelMap.teleportUnsupported: The server does not support map teleportation
TravelMap.teleportDisabled: The server has disabled this map teleport action
TravelMap.teleportUnsupportedOrTimeout: The server does not support map teleportation, or the request timed out
TravelMap.noSafePosition: No safe landing position was found near the target
TravelMap.targetOutOfWorld: The target coordinates are outside the world
TravelMap.teleportRolledBack: Landing verification failed; you were returned to the original position
TravelMap.teleportMalformed: The server rejected an invalid request
TravelMap.teleportDuplicate: A duplicate map teleport request was rejected
TravelMap.teleportDisconnected: The connection ended; map teleportation was cancelled
TravelMap.teleportInternalError: Teleportation failed; details were written to the log
TravelMap.targetChunkTimedOut: The target chunk timed out while loading
TravelMap.targetPlayerNoSafePosition: No safe landing position was found near the target player
TravelMap.targetPositionOutOfWorld: The target position is outside the world
TravelMap.teleportBusy: Another teleport is already running; try again shortly
TravelMap.invalidCaveY: Enter a whole number from 1 to 254
